text.title: Single Operator Funnel Rubric Output Contract
text.summary: Pins the shape of a valid Single Operator Funnel Rubric output. Subagent must satisfy this before returning to the caller.

required.field: named single owner of the rubric
exactly 4 entries: visit, signup, paid, retained
single committed investigation for next week

forbidden.pattern: more than one evidence source per stage
next_action absent on a week with any negative delta

allowed-transformations.transformation: Allowed to mark a stage 'no-data' if source was down — but the rubric still flags the largest measurable drop.

list.item: Every required field populated with a typed value
No forbidden pattern matches the output
